skill.name: social-playbook-skill
skill.description: Design and generate complete social media playbooks with scripts, captions, hooks, thumbnails, transitions, and posting plans for multi-platform campaigns.
skill.summary: Create structured social media campaign playbooks for videos, posts, captions, thumbnails, and publishing cadence.
skill.author: CleanExpo

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged Markdown backticks, weak cryptography keywords, and a screen capture phrase. Manual review found no executable shell code, cryptographic use, upload behavior, network exfiltration, credential access, or prompt injection attempt.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks Are Not Shell Execution
low_findings.description: The static findings at lines 14, 15, 17, 18, 19, and 49 are Markdown inline code spans naming database tables, source paths, and storage targets. They do not execute commands or instruct the assistant to run shell code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged text is visibly Markdown formatting in a documentation file. No interpreter, command runner, or command syntax is present in the skill.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Screen Capture Reference Is Planning Guidance
low_findings.description: Line 33 asks for suggested B-roll or screen capture ideas as part of a content playbook. It does not request capturing the user's screen, uploading images, or transmitting files.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The wording is creative direction for future marketing assets. There is no upload endpoint, capture command, or data transfer instruction.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern Has No Crypto Context
low_findings.description: Static findings at lines 3, 54, and 59 appear to be keyword collisions inside normal prose. No hashing, encryption, cipher selection, credential handling, or security-sensitive cryptography is described.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed lines describe social media planning, content libraries, and business audiences. I found no evidence of DES, MD5, SHA1, or other weak cryptographic use.

content.value_statement: Teams often lose time adapting one campaign idea across many social channels. This skill turns client goals into structured scripts, hooks, visuals, captions, and posting plans.
actual_capabilities: Creates campaign overviews with goals, personas, and target platforms.
Generates 10 to 30 video or post concepts with hooks and script outlines.
Maps content ideas to YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn formats.
Suggests thumbnail concepts, text overlays, visual styles, and transition ideas.
Builds weekly posting cadence recommendations for campaign execution.
Structures playbook details for later storage in social playbook and asset records.
limitations: It does not publish posts or connect to social platform APIs.
It does not create final video files, images, or edited media assets.
It depends on accurate client, brand, offer, and audience details.
It does not verify current platform policies, trends, or algorithm changes.

use_cases.title: Client Onboarding Content Plan
use_cases.description: Turn a new client's offer, audience, and goals into a launch-ready social content system.

use_cases.title: Product Launch Campaign
use_cases.description: Plan coordinated video, short-form, carousel, and LinkedIn content for a new feature or service.

use_cases.title: Small Business Content Library
use_cases.description: Create repeatable content ideas, hooks, captions, and thumbnails for service businesses with limited marketing staff.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Starter Playbook
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a full campaign outline.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a social media playbook for a [business type] offering [service]. Target [audience] on [platforms]. Include campaign goals, 10 content ideas, hooks, captions, and a weekly posting plan.

prompt_templates.title: Adapt One Idea Across Platforms
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for platform-specific content mapping.
prompt_templates.prompt: Take this campaign idea: [idea]. Turn it into YouTube long-form, YouTube Short, TikTok, Instagram Reel, Instagram carousel, Facebook post, and LinkedIn post formats.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Launch Content System
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for a coordinated product launch.
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a four-week launch playbook for [product or feature]. Include audience segments, video scripts, short-form hooks, thumbnail concepts, caption angles, transitions, and posting cadence.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Client-Ready Asset Plan
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for structured execution planning.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an implementation-ready playbook for [client]. Include campaign overview, 20 content concepts, script outlines, visual direction, platform mapping, cadence, and fields needed for asset tracking.

output_examples.input: A cleaning company wants more commercial leads from LinkedIn and short-form video.
output: Campaign goal: generate qualified commercial cleaning inquiries.
Hook example: Three signs your office cleaning contract is costing more than it should.
LinkedIn angle: practical checklist with a direct call to book an assessment.

output_examples.input: A software agency is launching a booking automation feature.
output: YouTube concept: show the old booking workflow beside the automated workflow.
Short-form version: 30-second before and after workflow breakdown.
Thumbnail concept: two-column comparison with a clear time saved message.

output_examples.input: A trade business needs a month of Instagram and Facebook content.
output: Week one focuses on trust signals, completed work, and common customer mistakes.
Week two introduces service education, estimate preparation, and objection handling.
Each post includes a hook, caption direction, and visual suggestion.

best_practices: Provide the client offer, audience, tone, platforms, and campaign goal before using the skill.
Review scripts and captions for brand accuracy, legal claims, and platform rules before publishing.
Use the generated playbook as a planning base, then refine with real performance data.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for generic viral ideas without a target customer or business goal.
Do not publish generated claims, testimonials, or guarantees without verification.
Do not use the same script unchanged across every platform and audience segment.

faq.question: Can this skill create a full social media campaign?
faq.answer: Yes. It can outline goals, concepts, hooks, scripts, captions, visuals, and posting cadence for several platforms.

faq.question: Does it publish content automatically?
faq.answer: No. It creates planning and execution materials. A user or separate publishing tool must schedule and publish posts.

faq.question: Which platforms does it support?
faq.answer: It supports planning for YouTube, YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, Reels, and carousel formats.

faq.question: Can it help with thumbnails and visuals?
faq.answer: Yes. It suggests thumbnail concepts, text overlays, B-roll ideas, screen capture ideas, transitions, and visual styles.

faq.question: What input improves the output?
faq.answer: Strong inputs include the offer, audience, brand tone, proof points, objections, target platforms, and campaign timeline.

faq.question: Is this safe for marketplace publication?
faq.answer: Manual review found no confirmed command execution, data exfiltration, credential access, upload behavior, or prompt injection attempt.
